description_long: This is a handheld electric drill with a robust, slightly curved plastic body in a muted gray color, featuring a visible power cord extending from the rear. The drill has a prominent ergonomic handle with a black trigger button for operation, and a metallic chuck at the front holding a straight drill bit. Ventilation slots are present on both sides of the main body to prevent overheating during use. A brand label is visible on one side, adding a touch of industrial authenticity. The overall design is utilitarian, with subtle surface wear indicating regular use, making it suitable for construction or repair tasks in urban environments.
description: A gray, corded electric drill with an ergonomic handle, visible trigger, and metallic drill bit, featuring ventilation slots and a brand label.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved handle, trigger button, power cord, and ventilation slots.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile, power cord exit, and ventilation slots.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the brand label, handle, trigger, and ventilation slots.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the drill bit, chuck, and the alignment of the handle and cord.
